metaTitle: Tick Control NYC | Tick Treatment for Yards | The Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control for NYC and suburban properties. Yard treatment, prevention programs. Protects against Lyme disease. Licensed exterminators. Call now.
h1: Tick Control in NYC — Protect Your Family and Pets
heroParagraph: Tick populations have expanded significantly across the NYC metro area in recent years, with blacklegged ticks (the species that transmits Lyme disease) now established throughout Long Island, Westchester, Staten Island, and the outer boroughs. Properties with wooded edges, leaf litter, or wildlife corridors are at highest risk. Our tick control programs treat the full property perimeter and tick habitat areas, with seasonal maintenance plans for continuous protection.
